title: Nightly cleanup timer never actually schedules anything
description_md:
`cleanup.timer` is supposed to trigger `cleanup.service` every night, but it's never actually run -- `/var/lib/app/last-cleanup` doesn't exist. Whoever wrote the timer unit didn't use systemd's actual calendar syntax. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), find why the timer won't activate, and get it scheduling correctly.

You're done when `cleanup.timer` is active with a valid, real next scheduled run time.
